_note_mapping: HyperLiquid Mode B `HyperliquidTransaction:ApproveAgent` — off-chain L1 approval of an `agentAddress` (an API/agent wallet that can act on the user's behalf, `agentName` label), signed via eth_signTypedData_v4. A delegation/permission action (security-relevant: the agent can place orders) with no faithful 8-domain ActionBody mapping → best-effort `Unknown` (routing win; structured representation = deferred off-chain-exchange variant, OUT OF SCOPE). D9 CAVEAT: the HyperLiquid SDK hard-codes the TESTNET signatureChainId 0x66eee (421614) for ApproveAgent; mainnet 42161 is assumed valid and both chains are listed so either routes (mainnet signatureChainId not 1차-confirmed beyond the SDK testnet default). See usd-send@1.0.0 for the full B.3 rationale.
